arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool LIVE: Team news and line-ups as Arne Slot’s side seek to remain top of Premier League
arts.sum: The Reds started the week with a two point lead over Chelsea and hope to top the table at Christmas

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool clash simulated to get a Premier League score prediction
arts.sum: We predict that Liverpool could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Alisson; Alexander-Arnold, Gomez, Van Dijk, Robertson; Gravenberch, Jones, Szoboszlai; Salah, Jota, Diaz. We predict that Tottenham could line up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their starting XI as follows: Forster; Porro, Dragusin, Gray, Udogie; Bissouma, Sarr, Maddison; Kulusevski, Solanke, Son.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted team vs Liverpool as Udogie starts and Postecoglou makes attacking change
arts.sum: Tottenham will be looking to give their supporters the perfect present ahead of Christmas by getting the better of Liverpool on Sunday evening. This weekend's game against Liverpool presents a real challenge, though, as the Merseyside club have made big strides under the guidance of new boss Arne Slot.

arts.ttl: Report: Tottenham feel they could sign £22.1m captain in January, Postecoglou aims to rotate him with Maddison
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou wants to rotate him with James Maddison 👀

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool midfielder leaves EFL managerial post after run of poor results
arts.sum: Former Liverpool midfielder Charlie Adam has left his role as manager of League Two team Fleetwood Town

arts.ttl: 'We are not like them' - Ibrahima Konate responds to Arsenal taunt after Bukayo Saka injury
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Ibrahima Konate responded to taunts from Arsenal fans after Bukayo Saka's injury blow

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou fires back at Jamie Carragher Tottenham criticism ahead of Liverpool showdown
arts.sum: The Tottenham gaffer isn't taking any notice of those criticising his all-action style in North London after a breathless victory against Manchester United

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Liverpool – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Liverpool in a huge Premier League fixture this weekend. Spurs head into the clash with momentum after scoring nine goals across their last two fixtures. Ange Postecoglou’s team scored five times before half-time against Southampton last weekend, before beating Manchester United 4-3 on Thursday night.
